description: Run read-only SQL queries against PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQLite databases. Only SELECT/WITH queries are allowed; write operations and DDL are blocked.

tools.name: query_sql
tools.description: Execute a read-only SELECT or WITH query and return tabular results.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: SQL query. Must start with SELECT or WITH and contain no write/DDL keywords.

tools.returns: Tabular text output with columns and up to 50 rows.
tools.whenToUse: Use when you need to inspect data in a configured database. Call list_tables or describe_table first if you do not know the schema.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP, ALTER, or any data modification. Do not use when DATABASE_URL is not configured.

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in the configured database.
tools.whenToUse: Use before writing queries to discover available tables.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use when the schema is already known.

tools.name: describe_table
tools.description: Describe columns, types, and primary key of a table.
tools.returns: Column names, types, nullability, and primary key information.
tools.whenToUse: Use before querying a table to understand its columns and keys.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for non-existent tables or for guessing table names.
